title: Metro Shoes Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Metro Shoes Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Metro Shoes Advisory Limited:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
